This is a nice and fairly productive apple tree, with good fruit for eating fresh. (Not very buggy.)

This is a large (brushy) area of apple and wild plum trees. Both apples and plums are of varying quality depending on the tree.

Apple tree with good eating apples, a little off the path. Access: Public.

A number of wild plum trees in this location, on both sides of the path. (These can also be found in many places along the Tri-County-Corridor.) Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
A number of wild plum trees along the edge of this wooded strip. This spot tends to be heavily shaded. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
